title: Smartr Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Smartr Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Smartr Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Smartr Logistics:
Smartr Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartr Logistics!
